subcodes.first_line: We have enjoined upon the seekers of the Ka'bah of the All-Merciful to teach, and have set forth the ways of teaching in manifold Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قاصدان کعبه رحمن را امر بتبلیغ نمودیم و سبل تبلیغ را هم در الواح متعدده
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
